rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Provides original taxonomy and survey of cybersecurity risks in AI code
rationale.survey-input: Survey of 70 practitioners details impact of various cybersecurity risks
rationale.expert-validated: Panel of 19 experts appraised framework and provided ISM matrices
rationale.metrics: ANN computes a cybersecurity risk level metric (measurand: security)
rationale.risk-security: Substantive focus on identifying and mitigating cybersecurity vulnerabilities
rationale.method-self-report: Conducted online questionnaire survey of 70 practitioners
rationale.method-field-study: Framework was implemented and validated via an organizational case study
